 placeholder

expectedFindings.semanticSummary: Mixing float: left with flexbox causes layout issues. Further this PR removes the float-based right alignment for .d-header .panel, which may cause the login panel in the non-Ember/noscript header (where .panel is nested inside .row and not a flex item) to stack under the title instead of remaining right-aligned.
-ms-align-items never existed in any version of IE/Edge; the correct legacy property is -ms-flex-align.

expectedNoFindingZones.reason: Fixture preamble and unchanged scaffolding should not produce review findings.
